changelog:
## v0.27.1

- **Fix** — Installer music and demofx now work on systems without MSVC runtime (static CRT linking)

## v0.27.0

- **TagLib Integration** — Universal metadata reading for all formats
- **SQLite Caches** — SmartScan and Waveform caches migrated from JSON to SQLite
- **Auto-Update System** — In-app update checking with download and silent install
- **pugixml** — XML parser integrated for future use
- **MurmurHash3** — Fast non-cryptographic hashing for cache keys
